name: Salesforce
one_line_desc: Customer Relationship Management (CRM) platform for sales and support.
self_serve_desc: Can create a free Salesforce Developer Edition account to get credentials immediately.
api_surface_desc: Extremely broad APIs spanning Core, Tooling, Metadata, and User Interface.
mcp_desc: Community MCP servers exist for Salesforce CRM.

name: HubSpot
one_line_desc: Inbound marketing, sales, and service software.
self_serve_desc: Can sign up for a free Developer Account and create test developer portals.
api_surface_desc: Broad REST API covering Contacts, Deals, Pipelines, Webhooks, and custom objects.
mcp_desc: Official and community MCP servers exist for HubSpot.

name: Pipedrive
one_line_desc: Pipeline-centric CRM for sales teams.
self_serve_desc: Free Developer Sandbox account can be requested by signing up to their partner portal.
api_surface_desc: Comprehensive REST API covering Deals, Activities, Contacts, and Webhooks.
mcp_desc: No official MCP server but REST API is well structured for an easy MCP build.

name: Attio
one_line_desc: Developer-first CRM and relationship database.
self_serve_desc: Anyone can register for a free account and generate API keys in developer settings.
api_surface_desc: Modern REST API covering Workspace, Lists, Records, and Attributes.
mcp_desc: Excellent OpenAPI spec allows generating an MCP server instantly.

name: Twenty
one_line_desc: Open-source CRM built as a modern alternative to Salesforce.
self_serve_desc: Self-host or sign up to Twenty Cloud for free and generate developer credentials.
api_surface_desc: Fully documented REST and GraphQL endpoints reflecting the database schema.
mcp_desc: Open-source structure is highly modular and ready for an MCP server.

name: Podio
one_line_desc: Customizable work management software and structured database.
self_serve_desc: Free plan allows generating API keys and Client IDs directly from developer settings.
api_surface_desc: Extensive API covering workspaces, items, files, and users.
mcp_desc: Clean REST endpoints but older infrastructure.

name: Zoho CRM
one_line_desc: Enterprise CRM by Zoho with multi-channel support.
self_serve_desc: Free developer accounts can be registered through Zoho Developer Console.
api_surface_desc: Very broad API covering Modules, Blueprints, Wizards, and Custom Functions.
mcp_desc: REST API exists, OAuth2 requirements add configuration complexity.

name: Close
one_line_desc: Inside sales CRM with built-in calling and emailing features.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for a 14-day free trial and obtain API key under settings.
api_surface_desc: Clean REST API mapping Leads, Contacts, Activities, and Custom Fields.
mcp_desc: Very agent-friendly REST API due to API key authentication.

name: Copper
one_line_desc: CRM built specifically for Google Workspace users.
self_serve_desc: Start a free trial and create API keys from Settings > Integrations.
api_surface_desc: Basic REST API matching standard CRM record types.
mcp_desc: API Key auth allows straightforward tool mapping.

name: DealCloud
one_line_desc: Specialized CRM for financial firms, private equity, and investment banking.
self_serve_desc: No self-serve sign up. Credentials are only provided to existing enterprise customers.
api_surface_desc: REST API for querying private database models and reporting.
mcp_desc: Blocked by strict enterprise gates and private hosting configurations.
blocker_reason: Requires paid enterprise subscription and admin enablement.

name: Zendesk
one_line_desc: Cloud-based customer support ticket management system.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for Zendesk Developer program or a free trial to create credentials.
api_surface_desc: Extremely broad API with endpoints for Tickets, Users, Orgs, and Help Center.
mcp_desc: Community MCP servers exist for Zendesk Support.

name: Intercom
one_line_desc: Customer messaging platform and helpdesk.
self_serve_desc: Can create a free Developer Workspace for sandbox testing.
api_surface_desc: Broad REST API for Contacts, Conversations, Messages, and Help Center articles.
mcp_desc: API has excellent webhooks and schema specs.

name: Freshdesk
one_line_desc: Helpdesk software for managing customer tickets.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for a free trial and access the API key under profile settings.
api_surface_desc: REST API covering Tickets, Agents, Customers, and Solutions.
mcp_desc: Clean API endpoints with static token auth.

name: Front
one_line_desc: Customer communication platform compiling emails and chats into shared inboxes.
self_serve_desc: Register for a free developer sandbox account via their developer program.
api_surface_desc: JSON REST API for managing inboxes, messages, teams, and channels.
mcp_desc: Clean schema definitions with static token option.

name: Pylon
one_line_desc: Customer support platform designed for Slack/Teams-first customer operations.
self_serve_desc: Must book a demo/talk to sales to get access. No public signup/trial.
api_surface_desc: REST API for linking Slack conversations to support queues.
mcp_desc: Lack of developer sandbox makes sandbox testing impossible.
blocker_reason: No public trial or free developer sandbox available.

name: LiveAgent
one_line_desc: Omnichannel helpdesk and live chat software.
self_serve_desc: Register for a free trial to obtain API key in settings.
api_surface_desc: REST API for agents, tickets, chats, and calls.
mcp_desc: Simple token auth leads to quick setup.

name: Plain
one_line_desc: Developer-first customer support platform with linear style interfaces.
self_serve_desc: Free tier allows generating API keys in settings.
api_surface_desc: GraphQL API for managing support threads, customers, and events.
mcp_desc: GraphQL schema simplifies querying but agent needs support for GraphQL.

name: Help Scout
one_line_desc: Shared inbox and customer support tool for teams.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for a free trial to generate OAuth credentials/tokens.
api_surface_desc: REST API V2 covering Mailboxes, Conversations, Customers, and Docs.
mcp_desc: Well-documented and structured REST endpoints.

name: Gorgias
one_line_desc: Ecommerce-focused customer service helpdesk.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for a free trial, then get API key under settings.
api_surface_desc: REST API designed to sync with Shopify/Magento and manage tickets.
mcp_desc: Very straightforward endpoints.

name: Gladly
one_line_desc: People-centered customer service platform focused on profiles over tickets.
self_serve_desc: Contact sales to purchase a license. No free developer signup.
api_surface_desc: REST APIs for customer profiles, conversations, and custom channels.
mcp_desc: Requires enterprise authorization.
blocker_reason: No developer program or self-serve trials exist.

name: Slack
one_line_desc: Team collaboration chat platform.
self_serve_desc: Can create a free workspace and build a Slack app to get bot tokens immediately.
api_surface_desc: Extremely broad API covering chat, files, channels, webhooks, and users.
mcp_desc: Official and community Slack MCP servers are widely available.

name: Twilio
one_line_desc: Cloud communications platform for SMS, Voice, and Video.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for a free developer trial account to get Account SID and Auth Token.
api_surface_desc: Extremely broad REST API with SDK support across major languages.
mcp_desc: API structure and Basic auth make it an ideal target for MCP.

name: Zoho Cliq
one_line_desc: Business chat and team collaboration app by Zoho.
self_serve_desc: Register on Zoho Developer Console to build extensions and get keys.
api_surface_desc: REST API covering chats, bots, channels, and widgets.
mcp_desc: Follows standard Zoho OAuth flow.

name: Lark (Larksuite)
one_line_desc: All-in-one collaborative suit by ByteDance containing chats, drive, and calendars.
self_serve_desc: Create a free Lark account and visit the Open Platform to create an app.
api_surface_desc: Extensive API covering spreadsheet, messaging, and admin tools.
mcp_desc: Lark has a very modern API interface.

name: Pumble
one_line_desc: Team chat app with similar interfaces to Slack.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for a free workspace and generate tokens in the settings dashboard.
api_surface_desc: Simple REST API covering channels and messages.
mcp_desc: API has lower complexity.

name: Discord
one_line_desc: Voice, video, and text communication platform for communities.
self_serve_desc: Register an application on Discord Developer Portal to generate Bot tokens.
api_surface_desc: Broad REST API + WebSockets for gateway connections.
mcp_desc: Discord community MCP servers exist.

name: Telegram
one_line_desc: Cloud-based mobile and desktop messaging app.
self_serve_desc: Create a bot using BotFather directly in the Telegram app to get tokens instantly.
api_surface_desc: Simple HTTP REST Bot API alongside MTProto protocol for deep client integrations.
mcp_desc: Telegram bot MCP servers exist.

name: WhatsApp Business
one_line_desc: API for large businesses to communicate with customers on WhatsApp.
self_serve_desc: Sign up on Meta for Developers portal, register a test number and get free tokens.
api_surface_desc: Graph API REST endpoints for sending templates, media, and text messages.
mcp_desc: Standardized Meta Graph API endpoints.

name: Aircall
one_line_desc: Cloud-based call center software integrating with CRMs.
self_serve_desc: Start a free trial, then generate API keys from the admin dashboard.
api_surface_desc: REST API covering calls, users, contacts, and numbers.
mcp_desc: Straightforward REST mapping.

name: Vonage
one_line_desc: Global cloud communications platform formerly known as Nexmo.
self_serve_desc: Register on Vonage Developer API portal to get free API keys and secret.
api_surface_desc: Broad APIs spanning SMS, Voice, Verify (2FA), and Video.
mcp_desc: Excellent OpenAPI specs are available.

name: Google Ads
one_line_desc: Online advertising platform by Google.
self_serve_desc: Free Developer Token can be generated in Google Ads Manager, but requires approval.
api_surface_desc: Very broad API for managing campaigns, budgets, and keyword planning.
mcp_desc: Requires Developer Token header in addition to OAuth2.

name: Meta Ads
one_line_desc: Advertising platform across Facebook, Instagram, and Messenger.
self_serve_desc: Create a Meta Developer app and use the Graph API Explorer to query Ads.
api_surface_desc: Graph API REST endpoint representing ad campaigns, creatives, and insights.
mcp_desc: Broad API but Meta Graph structure is complex.

name: LinkedIn Ads
one_line_desc: Professional marketing and advertising solutions on LinkedIn.
self_serve_desc: Request access to Marketing Developer Platform via LinkedIn Developer Portal.
api_surface_desc: REST APIs representing Ad Accounts, Campaigns, and Reporting.
mcp_desc: LinkedIn API portal requires brief application review.

name: GoHighLevel
one_line_desc: All-in-one marketing and business automation platform for agencies.
self_serve_desc: Requires a paid GoHighLevel account to generate API keys in Settings.
api_surface_desc: REST API V2 mapping Contacts, Calendars, Pipelines, and SMS templates.
mcp_desc: No developer trial; must pay $97+/mo to access the API.
blocker_reason: Requires a paid plan to get developer credentials.

name: Mailchimp
one_line_desc: Marketing automation and email marketing service.
self_serve_desc: Free tier allows generating API keys in user account dashboard.
api_surface_desc: REST API covering lists, campaigns, reports, and members.
mcp_desc: Very agent-friendly due to clear structure.

name: Klaviyo
one_line_desc: Marketing automation platform for ecommerce stores.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for a free developer sandbox and generate API keys.
api_surface_desc: REST API covering profiles, lists, metrics, and templates.
mcp_desc: Modern OpenAPI specification available.

name: systeme.io
one_line_desc: All-in-one online platform for marketing, sales funnels, and courses.
self_serve_desc: Create a free account and generate API keys under profile settings.
api_surface_desc: Simple REST API mapping leads, contacts, and purchases.
mcp_desc: Basic API key mapping.

name: Pinterest
one_line_desc: Social curation and image sharing network.
self_serve_desc: Create a developer app on Pinterest Developer portal to get trial keys.
api_surface_desc: REST API for Boards, Pins, Analytics, and Audiences.
mcp_desc: Standard OAuth2 flow.

name: Threads (Meta)
one_line_desc: Text-based social network by Meta.
self_serve_desc: Configure the Threads API product inside a Meta Developer App.
api_surface_desc: REST endpoints representing posts, media, and user metrics.
mcp_desc: Recently released public API.

name: SendGrid
one_line_desc: Cloud-based email delivery and transactional email service.
self_serve_desc: Register for a free account and generate an API key instantly.
api_surface_desc: JSON REST API covering mail send, lists, statistics, and subaccounts.
mcp_desc: Excellent OpenAPI specification.

name: Shopify
one_line_desc: Leading ecommerce platform for online stores.
self_serve_desc: Create a free Shopify Partner account to set up developer sandbox stores.
api_surface_desc: Very broad APIs. GraphQL is the primary interface for admin and storefront.
mcp_desc: Community MCP servers exist for Shopify.

name: WooCommerce
one_line_desc: Open-source customizable ecommerce plugin built for WordPress.
self_serve_desc: Free WordPress plugin. Generate Consumer Key/Secret in WordPress dashboard.
api_surface_desc: Broad REST API covering products, orders, coupons, and settings.
mcp_desc: Self-hosted nature means target URLs vary per store.

name: BigCommerce
one_line_desc: SaaS ecommerce platform for merchants.
self_serve_desc: Can create a free 15-day trial store or developer sandbox account.
api_surface_desc: Broad REST Storefront/Management API alongside GraphQL Storefront API.
mcp_desc: Has standard API scopes.

name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
one_line_desc: Enterprise cloud commerce platform for brands.
self_serve_desc: Requires partner credentials or existing enterprise contract. No public signup.
api_surface_desc: OCAPI (Open Commerce API) and SCAPI (Salesforce Commerce API) REST endpoints.
mcp_desc: Blocked by enterprise contract requirements.
blocker_reason: Requires enterprise-tier license and partner gate.

name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)
one_line_desc: Open-source and enterprise ecommerce platform by Adobe.
self_serve_desc: Free Open Source version can be downloaded and run locally for testing.
api_surface_desc: Large REST and GraphQL surface area mapping Adobe Commerce engine.
mcp_desc: Self-hosted setups need endpoint configuration.

name: Squarespace
one_line_desc: Website builder and blogging platform with ecommerce capabilities.
self_serve_desc: Requires a paid Website Business or Commerce plan to generate API keys.
api_surface_desc: Basic REST API for Inventory, Orders, Transactions, and Profiles.
mcp_desc: Blocked by payment wall to access developer panel.
blocker_reason: Requires a paid subscription (Business/Commerce plan).

name: Ecwid
one_line_desc: SaaS shopping cart plugin for existing websites.
self_serve_desc: Register on Ecwid Developers console for a free Developer Account.
api_surface_desc: REST API covering orders, products, and customer directories.
mcp_desc: Clean endpoints with standard OAuth flow.

name: Gumroad
one_line_desc: E-commerce platform for creators to sell digital products directly.
self_serve_desc: Free account allows creating Personal Access Tokens in advanced settings.
api_surface_desc: REST API for products, subscribers, and sales.
mcp_desc: Simple token auth leads to quick setup.

name: Amazon Selling Partner
one_line_desc: REST API for Amazon sellers to manage inventories and shipments.
self_serve_desc: Requires a paid Amazon Seller Professional Account ($39.99/mo) and developer registration.
api_surface_desc: Broad API with strict security standards (AWS IAM/LWA).
mcp_desc: Requires active Amazon Seller subscription.
blocker_reason: Requires a paid Amazon Seller Professional subscription.

name: fanbasis
one_line_desc: Monetization and digital marketplace platform for creators.
self_serve_desc: Private beta. No public documentation or API access.
api_surface_desc: No public API surface exists today.
mcp_desc: No API is available.
blocker_reason: No public developer API available; closed platform.

name: DataForSEO
one_line_desc: SEO and search engine scraping data APIs.
self_serve_desc: Register for free and receive $1 trial credit; uses Basic Auth (Login/Password).
api_surface_desc: Very broad API covering SERP, Keywords, Domain data, and SEO checks.
mcp_desc: API has excellent structural documentation.

name: SE Ranking
one_line_desc: All-in-one SEO platform.
self_serve_desc: Requires a paid subscription plan to request API access.
api_surface_desc: REST API covering ranking, audit, and competitor data.
mcp_desc: Requires paid plan for API credentials.
blocker_reason: Requires a paid plan to activate API tokens.

name: Ahrefs
one_line_desc: Industry-leading SEO toolset for backlinks and keyword analysis.
self_serve_desc: Requires a paid Ahrefs Enterprise or Custom plan ($999+/mo) to access API.
api_surface_desc: Broad API with detailed indices of web data.
mcp_desc: Blocked by extremely high paywall.
blocker_reason: Requires extremely expensive Enterprise/Custom plans.

name: MrScraper
one_line_desc: Visual web scraper and automated scraping tool.
self_serve_desc: Register for a free account to generate API keys in profile.
api_surface_desc: REST API to trigger scrapers and retrieve scraped JSON results.
mcp_desc: Simple token auth and clear scraping schemas.

name: Apify
one_line_desc: Cloud platform for web scraping, data extraction, and RPA.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for free and get API tokens in console dashboard.
api_surface_desc: Very broad API to execute Actors, get datasets, and manage tasks.
mcp_desc: Community MCP servers exist for Apify.

name: Firecrawl
one_line_desc: LLM-ready scraping tool that converts web pages into markdown.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for free to get an API key and 500 free scrape credits.
api_surface_desc: Simple REST API for crawl, scrape, and search mappings.
mcp_desc: Official and community Firecrawl MCP servers are available.

name: Bright Data
one_line_desc: Web scraping and proxy network platform.
self_serve_desc: Sign up with credit card verification for free trial credits and get API tokens.
api_surface_desc: REST API for proxies, Scraping Browsers, and Web Unlocker products.
mcp_desc: Developer-centric API design.

name: Sherlock
one_line_desc: Open-source OSINT tool to find usernames across social networks.
self_serve_desc: Open source CLI tool, no credentials or signup required.
api_surface_desc: Command-line interface with no hosted API endpoints.
mcp_desc: Can be packaged as a local CLI-based MCP server easily.

name: Waterfall.io
one_line_desc: Mobile communications and marketing messaging provider.
self_serve_desc: Must contact sales. Closed enterprise API, no self-serve trials.
api_surface_desc: SMS and push notification campaign APIs.
mcp_desc: Private documentation.
blocker_reason: Private developer program with sales gate and no sandbox.

name: Clay
one_line_desc: Data enrichment and lead-building spreadsheet tool.
self_serve_desc: Generate API keys in account settings; small free usage limit.
api_surface_desc: Simple REST API to trigger workspace runs and append rows.
mcp_desc: Good spec, straightforward token auth.

name: GitHub
one_line_desc: Git repository hosting and developer collaboration platform.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for free and generate Personal Access Tokens or register GitHub Apps.
api_surface_desc: Extremely broad APIs mapping all GitHub features.
mcp_desc: Official and community GitHub MCP servers exist.

name: Vercel
one_line_desc: Hosting platform for frontend frameworks and serverless functions.
self_serve_desc: Create a free account and generate Personal Access Tokens in account settings.
api_surface_desc: REST API covering deployments, domains, projects, and teams.
mcp_desc: Community MCP servers exist for Vercel.

name: Netlify
one_line_desc: Cloud hosting and serverless platform for web applications.
self_serve_desc: Generate Personal Access Tokens under User Settings.
api_surface_desc: REST API for deployments, forms, sites, and environment variables.
mcp_desc: Well-documented OpenAPI specification.

name: Cloudflare
one_line_desc: Web infrastructure, DNS, and security services.
self_serve_desc: Create a free account and generate API Tokens under profile options.
api_surface_desc: Very broad API covering zones, workers, DNS records, and firewalls.
mcp_desc: Community Cloudflare MCP servers exist.

name: Supabase
one_line_desc: Open-source backend-as-a-service using PostgreSQL.
self_serve_desc: Create a free project and find Anon/Service Role API keys in settings.
api_surface_desc: PostgREST and GraphQL interfaces mapped directly to database tables.
mcp_desc: Clean structures, excellent database tools mapping.

name: Neo4j
one_line_desc: Graph database management system.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for Neo4j Aura Free instance and receive connection keys.
api_surface_desc: REST API alongside Bolt driver protocol for Cypher queries.
mcp_desc: Neo4j official MCP server exists.

name: Snowflake
one_line_desc: Cloud-based data warehousing platform.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for a 30-day free trial containing $400 credits to test API.
api_surface_desc: Snowflake SQL REST API for executing queries and managing resources.
mcp_desc: Snowflake community MCP servers are available.

name: MongoDB Atlas
one_line_desc: Fully-managed MongoDB cloud database service.
self_serve_desc: Create a free MongoDB Atlas shared cluster and generate Project API Keys.
api_surface_desc: Atlas Data API (REST) and Atlas Admin API.
mcp_desc: MongoDB community MCP servers exist.

name: Datadog
one_line_desc: Monitoring and security service for cloud scale apps.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for a 14-day free trial to generate API and App keys.
api_surface_desc: Very broad API covering dashboards, metrics, logs, and monitors.
mcp_desc: Broad API endpoints, good library support.

name: Sentry
one_line_desc: Application monitoring and error tracking platform.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for developer account and generate Auth Tokens under User Settings.
api_surface_desc: REST API covering issues, projects, events, and releases.
mcp_desc: Community Sentry MCP servers exist.

name: Notion
one_line_desc: Connected workspace for notes, docs, and databases.
self_serve_desc: Create a free workspace, then create internal integrations under Developers portal.
api_surface_desc: REST API mapping Blocks, Pages, Databases, and Users.
mcp_desc: Official and community Notion MCP servers are available.

name: Airtable
one_line_desc: No-code relational database and spreadsheet platform.
self_serve_desc: Free account allows creating Personal Access Tokens inside Developer Hub.
api_surface_desc: Dynamic REST API generated per base, representing tables and records.
mcp_desc: Community Airtable MCP servers exist.

name: Linear
one_line_desc: Developer-first issue tracker and project management platform.
self_serve_desc: Create a free account, then generate Personal Access Tokens in account settings.
api_surface_desc: Broad and modular GraphQL API mapping all platform elements.
mcp_desc: Community Linear GraphQL MCP servers exist.

name: Jira
one_line_desc: Issue tracking and agile project management product by Atlassian.
self_serve_desc: Create a free developer sandbox or standard account, then generate API Tokens.
api_surface_desc: Extremely broad REST API covering issues, workflows, projects, and users.
mcp_desc: Community Jira MCP servers exist.

name: Asana
one_line_desc: Team collaboration and task management platform.
self_serve_desc: Generate Personal Access Tokens inside Developer Console.
api_surface_desc: REST API covering workspaces, projects, tasks, and users.
mcp_desc: Asana community MCP servers exist.

name: Monday.com
one_line_desc: Work operating system to build workflows and manage projects.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for a free Developer Account to get API token under developer menu.
api_surface_desc: Robust GraphQL API covering boards, items, columns, and updates.
mcp_desc: GraphQL schema simplifies querying but agent needs support.

name: ClickUp
one_line_desc: All-in-one productivity and work management platform.
self_serve_desc: Generate Personal Access Tokens inside User Settings > Apps.
api_surface_desc: Broad REST API covering workspaces, spaces, folders, lists, and tasks.
mcp_desc: OpenAPI specifications are available.

name: Coda
one_line_desc: Collaborative document editor integrating spreadsheets and word documents.
self_serve_desc: Generate API tokens in account settings page under integrations.
api_surface_desc: REST API covering documents, pages, tables, and rows.
mcp_desc: Excellent API documentation.

name: Smartsheet
one_line_desc: SaaS collaborative spreadsheet and project tracker.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for free developer account or trial to generate API tokens.
api_surface_desc: REST API for sheets, rows, files, and users.
mcp_desc: Follows standard API design.

name: Harvest
one_line_desc: Cloud time tracking and invoicing software.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for a free trial or developer account to generate API tokens.
api_surface_desc: REST API V2 mapping clients, projects, tasks, time entries, and users.
mcp_desc: Simple token auth leads to quick setup.

name: Stripe
one_line_desc: Financial infrastructure for payment processing and billing.
self_serve_desc: Create a free account to instantly get live/test Secret Keys in developer portal.
api_surface_desc: Extremely broad REST API covering charges, customers, subscriptions, and payouts.
mcp_desc: Stripe official MCP server exists.

name: Plaid
one_line_desc: API interface linking bank accounts with financial apps.
self_serve_desc: Sign up for a free developer account to get instant API keys for sandbox testing.
api_surface_desc: REST API for linking items, accounts, balances, transactions, and identity.
mcp_desc: Broad API but sandbox is open and well-documented.

name: Binance
one_line_desc: Leading cryptocurrency exchange platform.
self_serve_desc: Create account and enable API Management in dashboard to generate keys.
api_surface_desc: Broad REST and WebSocket API for market data and trading executions.
mcp_desc: API key auth allows straightforward tool mapping.

name: Paygent Connect
one_line_desc: Japanese online payment processing gateway by NTT Data.
self_serve_desc: Requires formal business review and merchant account setup. No open sandbox.
api_surface_desc: REST endpoints representing payments, refunds, and recurring billings.
mcp_desc: Blocked by strict Japanese business gates and merchant validations.
blocker_reason: Merchant application and registration required.

name: iPayX
one_line_desc: Electronic billing presentment and payment (EBPP) solution.
self_serve_desc: Must submit enterprise inquiry. No developer portal or sandbox.
api_surface_desc: SOAP and REST billing endpoints.
mcp_desc: Blocked by lack of public documentation.
blocker_reason: No public developer documentation or sandbox available.

name: QuickBooks
one_line_desc: Accounting software for small and medium businesses by Intuit.
self_serve_desc: Sign up on Intuit Developer portal to launch a free QuickBooks Sandbox.
api_surface_desc: Broad API covering invoices, customers, vendors, and payments.
mcp_desc: Follows standard Intuit developer portal guidelines.

name: Xero
one_line_desc: Cloud-based accounting software for small businesses.
self_serve_desc: Create a free account in Xero Developer Portal to deploy demo companies.
api_surface_desc: Broad REST API covering invoices, bank transactions, and contacts.
mcp_desc: Well-documented OAuth2 workflows.

name: Brex
one_line_desc: Corporate credit cards and expense management platform for startups.
self_serve_desc: Register on Brex Developer portal to instantly get sandbox keys.
api_surface_desc: REST API covering expenses, transactions, card management, and cash accounts.
mcp_desc: Clean API reference specifications.

name: Ramp
one_line_desc: Finance automation platform spanning corporate cards, expense reports, and bills.
self_serve_desc: Sign up on Ramp Developer platform to set up mock environments.
api_surface_desc: REST API mapping cards, transactions, and business entities.
mcp_desc: Standard developer console.

name: PitchBook
one_line_desc: Financial data and research database focusing on private equity and venture capital.
self_serve_desc: Must purchase an enterprise account (costs thousands/yr) to request API access.
api_surface_desc: Enterprise REST and feeds API.
mcp_desc: Blocked by high enterprise pricing gates.
blocker_reason: Requires high-tier corporate pricing and contract negotiation.

name: NotebookLM
one_line_desc: Personal AI research assistant by Google.
self_serve_desc: NotebookLM has no direct API. The underlying Gemini API can be used instead.
api_surface_desc: No public API surface exists for NotebookLM.
mcp_desc: NotebookLM product lacks developer endpoints.
blocker_reason: No direct public API exists for NotebookLM.

name: Otter AI
one_line_desc: AI meeting transcription and summary platform.
self_serve_desc: No open developer portal. Contact sales or submit partner forms.
api_surface_desc: Basic internal webhook and API systems, highly restricted.
mcp_desc: Blocked by restricted developer program.
blocker_reason: No public API developer documentation or sign up available.

name: Fathom
one_line_desc: AI-powered meeting recorder that integrates with Zoom and Google Meet.
self_serve_desc: Must submit a developer request form to get credentials. Gated sandbox.
api_surface_desc: REST API covering calls, users, transcripts, and integrations.
mcp_desc: Restricted developer portal approval process.
blocker_reason: Requires developer form approval or enterprise package.

name: Consensus
one_line_desc: AI academic search engine finding consensus inside research papers.
self_serve_desc: Requires a custom API enterprise agreement to generate keys.
api_surface_desc: Simple query and extract paper REST API.
mcp_desc: Blocked by enterprise contract requirements.
